# Rellia Health
> Rellia Health connects health tech founders, clinicians, advisors, and investors through programs, events, and a curated network. This file lists indexable public pages for AI assistants and answer engines.
Rellia offers founder programs (QMS, fundraising, regulatory, clinical validation), an alumni and advisor directory, investor pitch events, and a startup diagnostic. Primary calls to action: apply to the network (`/apply`), contact (`/contact`), and program enrollment pages.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.relliahealth.com): Rellia Health connects founders, clinicians, and health systems to build the future of care. Join our network and explore programs.
- [/about](https://www.relliahealth.com/about): Learn how Rellia Health brings together operators, investors, and clinical leaders to scale solutions that matter for patients and health systems.
- [/programs](https://www.relliahealth.com/programs): Explore Rellia Health programs designed to help healthcare builders learn, connect, and grow with the right stakeholders.
- [/apply](https://www.relliahealth.com/apply): Apply to join the Rellia Network. Built for founders, advisors, investors, and industry partners shaping the future of health.
- [/events](https://www.relliahealth.com/events): Register for upcoming Rellia Health events on Luma and explore past event pages. Practical sessions for builders in health tech.
- [/contact](https://www.relliahealth.com/contact): Get in touch with Rellia Health about partnerships, programs, or press. We respond to serious inquiries from builders and collaborators.


## Network

- [/founders](https://www.relliahealth.com/founders): The home for health tech founders: membership pathway, programs, advisor access, and directories—built for operators scaling in healthcare.
- [/founders/alumni](https://www.relliahealth.com/founders/alumni): Browse health tech companies in the Rellia alumni network—stage tags and profiles for founder discovery.
- [/advisors](https://www.relliahealth.com/advisors): Mentor health tech founders with flexible 1–3 hour engagements—benefits, criteria, and how to join Rellia as an advisor.
- [/advisors/directory](https://www.relliahealth.com/advisors/directory): Search and filter Rellia advisors by expertise—operators, clinicians, and specialists who mentor serious health tech founders.
- [/investors](https://www.relliahealth.com/investors): Benefits of Rellia-backed startups, thesis-aware pitch formats, and partner pathways for funds and angel groups.
- [/industry-partners](https://www.relliahealth.com/industry-partners): Sponsor programs, join directories, and partner with Rellia—including GetProven vendor marketplace benefits for portfolios.
- [/consulting](https://www.relliahealth.com/consulting): One-to-one and scoped consulting for health tech founders—regulatory, clinical, commercial, and narrative depth beyond community rhythm.


## Programs

- [/programs/advance-data-room-deep-dive](https://www.relliahealth.com/programs/advance-data-room-deep-dive): Navigate due diligence and data room management. Practical tools and tips for early-stage founders raising capital.
- [/programs/advisory-board-match](https://www.relliahealth.com/programs/advisory-board-match): Recruit ideal experts for your startup. Rellia provides matchmaking, equity benchmarking, and legal frameworks for productive advisory relationships.
- [/programs/build-your-quality-management-system](https://www.relliahealth.com/programs/build-your-quality-management-system): Build a lean, scalable QMS for ISO 13485, MDSAP, and FDA compliance. Expert guidance for medtech and digital health founders.
- [/programs/design-your-brand-strategy](https://www.relliahealth.com/programs/design-your-brand-strategy): Develop a professional brand identity that earns trust from clinicians and investors. Includes sprints for website, UI, and sales collateral.
- [/programs/elevate-healthcare-capital](https://www.relliahealth.com/programs/elevate-healthcare-capital): Refine your fundraising strategy for health tech. Upgrade your pitch to meet the technical and clinical expectations of healthcare investors.
- [/programs/first-50-users-clinical-feedback-intensive](https://www.relliahealth.com/programs/first-50-users-clinical-feedback-intensive): Validate your product with Rellia's clinician network. Gain IRB guidance and professional feedback to bridge the gap from prototype to clinical use.
- [/programs/ignite-pitch-foundations](https://www.relliahealth.com/programs/ignite-pitch-foundations): Master fundraising essentials. Craft your first pitch deck and presentation with expert feedback to build investor confidence.
- [/programs/low-fidelity-prototype-lab](https://www.relliahealth.com/programs/low-fidelity-prototype-lab): Transform your vision into a functional prototype. Connect with vetted development firms and testing experts to build your proof of concept.
- [/programs/regulatory-strategy-sprint](https://www.relliahealth.com/programs/regulatory-strategy-sprint): Map your regulatory path across FDA, Health Canada, and EU MDR. Leave with a documented strategy for investor due diligence.


## Events

- [/events](https://www.relliahealth.com/events): Register for upcoming Rellia Health events on Luma and explore past event pages. Practical sessions for builders in health tech.
- [/events/ai-healthcare-compliance](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/ai-healthcare-compliance): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/ask-a-qms-expert](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/ask-a-qms-expert): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/beyond-the-product-how-digital-health-brands-earn-trust-and-drive-growth](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/beyond-the-product-how-digital-health-brands-earn-trust-and-drive-growth): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/clinician-connect-primary-care](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/clinician-connect-primary-care): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/clinician-connect-womens-health](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/clinician-connect-womens-health): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/ethics-in-ai-less-about-tech-more-about-humans](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/ethics-in-ai-less-about-tech-more-about-humans): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/health-system-adoption-for-startups](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/health-system-adoption-for-startups): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/investor-readiness-how-vcs-evaluate-startups](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/investor-readiness-how-vcs-evaluate-startups): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/leadership-under-pressure](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/leadership-under-pressure): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/rellia-pitch-event-forum-ventures](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/rellia-pitch-event-forum-ventures): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/scaling-with-purpose-from-prototype-to-customer-in-health-startups](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/scaling-with-purpose-from-prototype-to-customer-in-health-startups): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/second-opinion-when-healthcare-startups-need-user-research](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/second-opinion-when-healthcare-startups-need-user-research): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/set-your-stage](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/set-your-stage): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.
- [/events/why-healthcare-says-no-to-your-ai](https://www.relliahealth.com/events/why-healthcare-says-no-to-your-ai): Event details, location, and registration for Rellia Health sessions. Explore upcoming and past programs.


## Stories & news

- [/stories](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories): The latest founder spotlights, industry insights, & program updates. Stay current with the people and ideas shaping the future of health.
- [/stories/founder-spotlight-the-first-clinical-champion](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories/founder-spotlight-the-first-clinical-champion): Your first champion is not your biggest fan—they’re your first risk partner. Here’s what worked, what didn’t, and the script that finally got a real yes.
- [/stories/founder-spotlight-the-pilot-that-became-procurement](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories/founder-spotlight-the-pilot-that-became-procurement): A founder shares the three changes that turned a promising pilot into a signed rollout—without adding months of bureaucracy or burning out the clinical team.
- [/stories/founder-spotlight-what-we-stopped-building](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories/founder-spotlight-what-we-stopped-building): A founder explains how they cut scope without sacrificing outcomes—and why “less product” was the reason implementation finally worked.
- [/stories/industry-insight-commercialization-milestones-that-reduce-risk](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories/industry-insight-commercialization-milestones-that-reduce-risk): Not all milestones change what’s true for the buyer. Here’s a checklist for choosing milestones that reduce clinical, operational, security, and financial risk.
- [/stories/industry-insight-evidence-that-compounds](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories/industry-insight-evidence-that-compounds): Trust is cumulative—but only if you collect evidence in a way that fits the product lifecycle. Here’s a lightweight approach that strengthens credibility every month.
- [/stories/industry-insight-implementation-is-a-product](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories/industry-insight-implementation-is-a-product): Implementation isn’t what happens after the sale. It’s part of what the buyer is buying. Here’s how to design onboarding that earns trust fast.
- [/stories/industry-insight-security-reviews-without-stalling](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories/industry-insight-security-reviews-without-stalling): Security reviews can either become a momentum-killer or a trust accelerant. Here’s how to show your work, reduce uncertainty, and keep the timeline moving.
- [/stories/program-update-how-we-run-founder-salons](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories/program-update-how-we-run-founder-salons): Founder salons can become performative. We designed ours to produce clarity: one constraint, one decision, and one next move per founder.
- [/stories/program-update-office-hours-to-decisions](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories/program-update-office-hours-to-decisions): We rebuilt office hours so founders leave with one thing: a decision they can ship this week. Here’s the format and why it works.
- [/stories/program-update-the-qms-sprint-playbook](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories/program-update-the-qms-sprint-playbook): A behind-the-scenes look at how we run quality sprints so teams leave with real artifacts: scope, risk decisions, document skeletons, and a plan they can execute next week.
- [/stories/the-one-decision-healthcare-buyers-need](https://www.relliahealth.com/stories/the-one-decision-healthcare-buyers-need): Most deals don’t fail because the product is weak. They fail because the next stakeholder can’t safely approve it. Here’s a practical way to structure proof so every meeting reduces risk.


## Startup diagnostic

- [/diagnostic-survey](https://www.relliahealth.com/diagnostic-survey): Complete the Rellia Health diagnostic survey to receive your readiness report and personalized advisory board matches.

## Legal

- [/privacy](https://www.relliahealth.com/privacy): How Rellia Health collects, uses, and protects personal information when you use our website and services.
- [/terms](https://www.relliahealth.com/terms): Terms of use for the Rellia Health website and services. Please read before using our site or programs.


## Optional

- [/careers](https://www.relliahealth.com/careers): Explore open roles at Rellia Health. Join a mission-driven team connecting health tech founders with clinicians, advisors, and investors.
- [/faq](https://www.relliahealth.com/faq): Answers to common questions about Rellia Health programs, membership, events, and how we work with founders and partners.
- [/startup-diagnostic](https://www.relliahealth.com/startup-diagnostic): Benchmark your health tech startup across 12 critical domains. Get an instant readiness score, personalized gap analysis, and advisory board matching.
